name: Context7
description: Fetch up-to-date, version-specific library documentation and code examples directly from Context7's indexed library database. Eliminates hallucinated API docs by pulling real docs for any library the LLM needs.

tools_summary.name: resolve-library-id
tools_summary.description: Resolve a library name to its Context7-compatible library ID

tools_summary.name: get-library-docs
tools_summary.description: Fetch up-to-date documentation for a specific library version from Context7

setup_instructions: No API key required. Works out of the box. Optionally set CONTEXT7_API_KEY for higher rate limits.
